### Summary
- 

### Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue(s)
- [ ] Labels set (priority, component, `status:needs_review`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Changelog updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] Skill docs updated under `skills/cosmos/` (if CLI/SDK/provenance changed)

### Validation
- [ ] `make fmt`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`

### Risk
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Schema/provenance contract change
- [ ] Security-sensitive change

### Notes for Reviewers
-
